pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce the npmai ecosystem, explaining the 'Zero Setup' philosophy, core capabilities (LLM interface, RAG, Memory), and the high-level system architecture

page_notes.content: Read whole repo and different branches

pages.purpose: Explain the internal package organization, module structure, and design patterns

pages.purpose: Define the JSON schema for LLM requests and responses, including optional validated_schema parameter

pages.purpose: High-level architecture of the RAG framework, its FastAPI endpoints, and integration points

pages.purpose: Demonstrate validated_schema parameter for enforcing JSON output structures from LLMs

pages.purpose: Explain how npmai integrates with LangChain framework and extends langchain_core.language_models.llms.LLM
